arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Bove “Feeling better” according to club director Ferrari
arts.sum: Fiorentina's Director General Alessandro Ferrari has provided an update on Edoardo Bove's health condition following the player's collapse during Sunday's match. The post Fiorentina’s Bove “Feeling better” according to club director Ferrari appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Roma Director Lambasts Referees Over Early Errors
arts.sum: Florent Ghisolfi pointed his finger at the referees, asserting that they have contributed to Roma’s poor start this season: “There were seven clear errors against us, all recognized by the national newspapers and TV shows." The post Roma Director Lambasts Referees Over Early Errors appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove recovering after on-field collapse
arts.sum: Fiorentina have provided a positive update on the condition of midfielder Edoardo Bove, who collapsed during Sunday's Serie A match against Inter Milan. The post Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove recovering after on-field collapse appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina Provide an Encouraging Update on Bove
arts.sum: Edoardo Bove is out of the woods, although it’s uncertain what caused him to go into cardiac arrest during Sunday’s match versus Inter at this point. He’s recovering at the Careggi hospital: "He's vigil and oriented." The post Fiorentina Provide an Encouraging Update on Bove appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina's Bove conscious after on-field collapse
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove is conscious and responsive after spending the night in hospital having collapsed during Sunday's Serie A game against Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina's Bove 'awake and alert' after collapse vs Inter
arts.sum: Fiorentina have announced midfielder Edoardo Bove is awake and "alert" after being placed in a medically-induced coma following his collapse during a game on Sunday.
